column1: # Practical & difficulty — everyday practical qualities of things/tasks.
# Belongs here: convenience (便利, 不便), ease vs. difficulty (簡単, 複雑,
# 単純, 大変), and freedom/comfort (自由, 楽). Certainty/safety go in

column4: tough; hard; serious; very (adverbial use also common)
rather high; on the high side
